---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the Gift Wrap extension
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: nurkamol
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. e.g. "I always have to manually update the price in two places..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or any other context that helps explain the request.
